payload.answer: Potential temporal update detected. Existing memory says the Brain Slack agent is planned/open, while the new input says the MVP is now implemented. Because the new statement narrows scope to the MVP, this should not automatically overwrite the broader project status. Store the MVP implementation as a scoped fact and mark the broader project record for review or status refinement.
citations: Existing: "The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open"
New: "The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented"

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement appears related to the existing project but refers specifically to the MVP, which may represent a milestone or narrower scope rather than a direct replacement of the full project record.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

details: Detected related entities despite punctuation differences.
Classified as a soft conflict because status changed over time and scope narrowed from project to MVP.
Did not treat the older project-level status as current for the MVP.

repair_options: Add a new scoped memory: "The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented."
Retain the broader project record until confirmed whether the full Brain Slack agent is also implemented or still open.
If desired, revise the broader project status to reflect progress, e.g. "in progress" or "MVP implemented," but only with explicit confirmation.
